name: Vermicelli with Red Clam Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 Medium cloves garlic, peeled and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place clams in a large pan and cover with water. Add the salt, stir, and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
2. Heat olive oil over medium heat in a large pan. Add garlic and red pepper flakes; sauté about 2 minutes.
3. Add tomato puree and wine, bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Drain clams in a colander and rinse well. Return clams to the sauce with half of the parsley. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium, cover, and cook for about 7 minutes, or until clam shells have opened. Discard any unopened clams.
5. Remove clams with a slotted spoon and place in a bowl, covered. Drain pasta and add to the sauce. Stir for about 3 minutes so that the pasta absorbs some of the sauce.
6. Toss with the remaining parsley, parmesan, and clams. Serve on heated plates or in pasta bowls.
